name: Dispatcher
description: Production storefront: classify_triage + classify_intent (keyword rules, no router LLM), then one specialist per turn on /api/chat/stream. ~60–120 ms classification; one Bedrock call.
codeSnippet:
intent = classify_intent(message)  # rules, not LLM
specialist = build_stock_keeper()  # example
response = specialist(message)     # one LLM call

name: Agents-as-Tools
description: Haiku orchestrator + specialists as @tool. Two LLM calls per turn. Atelier teaching path and in-process /api/agent/chat — not the Boutique hot path.

name: Graph
description: Strands GraphBuilder DAG: router node + specialist nodes with conditional edges. Multi-step ops and Atelier telemetry — not default for Marco pills.
